title: 101 shown at Seattle Film Fair
wikitext:
[]: 1.01 shown at Seattle Film Fair             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Fri Jun 06, 2008 5:07 pm Anyone see it? http://www.siff.net/festival/film/detail.aspx?id=27586&FID=64 If its been show/seen elsewhere, as subtitled, which translation & how good? Any clues about R1 DVD licensees?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 06, 2008 9:31 pm Does that make it the North American premiere or has it played somewhere else before?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Jun 08, 2008 4:16 pm no, fanimecon had it i think

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 15, 2008 5:58 pm It was played at Fanime 08 via fansub apparently.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Tue Jun 17, 2008 7:20 pm NO! I live an hour away! Why didn't I hear about it?! <sobbing>

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 18, 2008 5:55 pm It was mentioned in a thread on here and on the main page of evageeks.org Though if it helps any, I didn't bother going either. (I live near Fanime too)

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Sun Sep 21, 2008 4:00 pm This doesn't deserve a new thread, but 1.0 is currently being shown at HIFF , and I went to see the Saturday's screening. The movie was actually better than I had dared to expect, and the English subtitles were really good too, although I have no idea who the translator was. Funnily enough, almost everyone left the theater during the closing credits and thus missed the "next episode" preview.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 22, 2008 11:50 am I'm wondering if all these Rebuild 1.0 showings used the subtitles from that Pusan(sp) film festival or not? From the clips I saw of that awhile back, the subs were really accurate.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Mon Sep 22, 2008 4:41 pm Does this mean a dub is unlikely then ?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 22, 2008 5:17 pm I would say so.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Tue Sep 23, 2008 6:18 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm wondering if all these Rebuild 1.0 showings used the subtitles from that Pusan(sp) film festival or not? From the clips I saw of that awhile back, the subs were really accurate.

[]:             Quote Post by Chrad » Tue Nov 25, 2008 2:19 am This probably isn't worth starting a new thread over, so I'll put it here: For Sydney people, Evangelion 1.0 is showing at Greater Union George St. at 6:00 PM on Tuesday, 9th December.
